title: carex fluviatilis
intro: Carex fluviatilis, also known as the River Sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Carex fluviatilis has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Carex fluviatilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties.
